title: Manufacturing Engineer - Charak Pharma South Asia Partners - Apply Now

jsonLd.title: Manufacturing Engineer - Charak Pharma South Asia Partners - Apply Now
jsonLd.description:
We at Charak Pharma South Asia Partners are looking for an experienced Manufacturing Engineer based out of Mysuru. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Charak Pharma South Asia Partners:
Charak Pharma South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in TPM

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Life and accident insurance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Mysuru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Charak Pharma South Asia Partners!
